---
title: "Professional Summary"
title-block: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-copy: true
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px;">
  <a href="documents/BdeGouw_Resume.pdf" target="_blank" download>
    Bowen de Gouw - Resume (PDF)
  </a>
</div>

<object
  data="documents/BdeGouw_Resume.pdf"
  type="application/pdf"
  width="100%"
  height="1000px"
  style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px;"
>
  <p>
    Your browser can’t display the PDF inline.
    <a href="documents/BdeGouw_Resume.pdf" target="_blank" download>
      Download the resume here.
    </a>
  </p>
</object>

---

<div style="text-align: center; font-style: italic; margin-top: 40px;">
  <strong>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/bdegouw" target="_blank">GitHub</a> ·
    <a href="mailto:bdegouw@bu.edu">Email</a>
  </strong>
</div>
